get.summary: List registered providers with their capability matrix

post.summary: Compare quotes — fan out to every eligible provider in parallel
Save quote — get motor premium from a provider

get.summary: Retrieve a previously saved quote by transaction id

post.summary: Proposal — bind a quote into a policy
OVD KYC — upload identity & address proofs (multipart/form-data)

get.summary: Fetch the Certificate of Insurance (base64 PDF)

post.summary: Issue the policy — bind payment to the proposal (FG PolicyIssuance)
Renewal quote — price an existing policy (FG motorRenewal)
Renewal create — issue the renewed policy with the payment receipt
